title: Square sales integration

posts.author: Mvmtmatters (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to automate imports of monthly sales data from Square into Monday boards. I’ve seen zapier and other ones but I don’t see those monthly actions only singular sales transactions which is way more data than I want. Any suggestions?
